sp_widget.name: Load Tables
sp_widget.template:
You are not connected to any instance!

Browse Records

Select tables from {{c.data.instanceName}}

Showing {{c.getVisibleTables().length}} tables

{{t.label}}
{{t.name}}
Back to all tables

{{c.selectedTable.label}}

{{c.selectedTable.name}} {{c.records.length}} total records
{{c.getSelectedCount()}}
{{c.getSelectedCount()}} record{{c.getSelectedCount()==1?'':'s'}} selected
From table {{c.selectedTable.label}}
Filters
{{f.logic}}
{{col.label}}
PREVIEW
{{c.getStateLabel(r[col.key])}} {{r[col.key] || '-'}}
Page {{c.currentPage}} of {{c.getTotalPages()}}

Run Migration

Migrating {{c.total}} record(s) using connection: {{c.conn_name}}
✔ Migration Completed Successfully
Progress: {{c.inserted + c.updated}} / {{c.total}}
✖ {{c.migrationResult.message}}
Overall Progress
{{c.progress}}%
{{log}}

Record Preview

{{val || '-'}}
